articles.description: When you’re juggling more than just your own calendar, staying organized can be overwhelming. Since then I have booted into Windows exactly twice: once to scan a […]

articles.title: Trump fires the entire National Science Board
articles.description: Multiple sources are reporting that the Trump administration has dismissed the entire National Science Board (NSB). The NSB advises the president and Congress on the National Science Foundation (NSF), which has already been funding research at historically low levels and has seen significant delays in doling out that funding. The NSF has been fundamental in […]

articles.title: An influx of used EVs could drive down prices
articles.description: Part of what has held back electric cars has been the cost. But an influx of used vehicles over the next three years could bring prices down dramatically. In 2025, just 123,000 leases on EVs expired. That is expected to more than double to 300,000 in 2026, and double again to 600,000 in 2027 and […]

articles.title: Researchers say we’re talking less than ever
articles.description: Researchers at the University of Missouri-Kansas City and the University of Arizona say that between 2005 and 2019, the number of words we speak out loud to another human being fell by nearly 28 percent. And that has likely only gotten worse following the pandemic. The researchers actually counted the number of words we were […]

One of my favorites so far is the Sharge Icemag 3, a 10,000mAh model that can wirelessly output 25W to […]

articles.title: Xbox’s weirdest studio is on a roll
articles.description: For a while there, it seemed like Double Fine might be struggling under the Microsoft corporate umbrella. The game studio led by Tim Schafer is beloved for offbeat titles like Brütal Legend and Broken Age, but after being acquired by Microsoft in 2019, its only new release for years was a long-awaited sequel to Psychonauts. articles.title: Tell HN: An app is silently installing itself on my iPhone every day
articles.description: Every day for the past 3 days around 1pm EST the 'Headspace' app has been silently appearing on my iPhone (13 Pro). Automatic downloads are turned off and I've updated to the latest iOS since this started happening. I googled around and found a couple reddit threads with people reporting the exact same thing starting 2 or 3 days ago. There were reports from people on iPhone 12 and iPhone 17 so it doesn't seem device-specific. Anyone else seeing this? Does anyone understand how or why this is happening? tech.summary:
🔬 今日科技动态摘要

1. **政治干预科研引发关注**：特朗普解雇了整个国家科学委员会，同时有报道称至少10名参与美国敏感研究的人员死亡或失踪，引发对科研独立性和安全性的担忧。
2. **电动汽车市场或迎降价潮**：大量二手电动汽车涌入市场，可能推动整体价格下降，对消费者和新能源车普及产生积极影响。
3. **操作系统与硬件体验升级**：有用户表示转用Linux三个月后完全不怀念Windows；同时，新型机器人控制软件可避免关节卡滞，Qi2.2 MagSafe快充电池等智能硬件价格走低。
4. **科技公司内部争议与项目受阻**：Palantir员工公开讨论公司“走向法西斯主义”；华纳兄弟因试图秘密取消《Coyote v. Acme》电影而引发公众反弹。
5. **人类社交行为变化**：研究指出，人们现在的交流比以往任何时候都少，暗示数字时代对人际互动的深远影响。

今日最值得关注的发展是**政治力量对科研体系的干预加剧，以及二手电动车市场可能带来的价格革命**，这两者分别从制度和消费层面深刻影响科技与社会的未来走向。

ai.summary:
🔬 今日AI动态摘要

1. **大模型“降智”与可靠性争议**：Claude被曝光存在越聊越傻、性能下降等问题，三个具体bug被披露，引发对AI模型长期使用稳定性的关注。
2. **医疗AI与多模态模型突破**：全球首个医疗视频理解大模型开源，附带6000+组精标测试集与英雄榜，推动AI在垂直医疗领域的应用落地。
3. **自动驾驶与物理AI加速融合**：华为发布ADS 5，强化世界模型路线并计划投入180亿；DeepSeek阮翀加盟元戎，详解基座VLA提效10倍；轻舟智航进军物理AI赛道，显示自动驾驶向通用智能演进趋势。
4. **国产AI图像生成能力再升级**：国产AI生图模型被指“硬刚GPT-Image-2”，技术天花板被再次突破，国内图像生成领域竞争加剧。
5. **AI应用向生活场景渗透**：涂鸦智能推出AI宠物健康监测与全屋智能“超级入口”；华为乾崑智驾加持全新奥迪Q5L，燃油车智能化进程加速。

今日最值得关注的发展是：**自动驾驶与物理AI的融合成为新焦点，华为与DeepSeek等企业通过世界模型和VLA技术，推动AI从感知走向决策与行动，同时国产大模型在医疗、图像生成等垂直领域持续突破，应用落地加速。**

articles.title: Education, health fees among key concerns
articles.description: China to legislate on preschool education

articles.title: International group praises green revival
articles.description: A high-level international advisory body applauded China's efforts to improve the environment and suggested a 15-year strategy against pollution in a draft recommendation report on Monday.

articles.title: Beijing, Moscow drill for potential missile warfare
articles.description: China and Russia kicked off their second joint computer-assisted anti-missile drill on Monday, a move experts said could deter potential missile threats amid rising tensions on the Korean Peninsula.

articles.title: Memorial Day a time to 'remember', 'inspire'
articles.description: A memorial service to mark the 80th anniversary of the Nanjing Massacre committed during the War of Resistance Against Japanese Aggression (1931-45) brought together hundreds of activists and members of the Chinese and other Asian communities on Sunday in San Francisco.

articles.title: More military technologies targeted for civilian sector to boost economy
articles.description: China will strengthen innovation by developing high-tech industries with military technologies to boost military-civil integration, a move that aims to cultivate new growth drivers and boost the economy, said a recent State Council guideline.

articles.title: Dangerous stunts get thumbs-down from video platforms
articles.description: Multiple social media and video streaming platforms will limit who can view videos that depict dangerous stunts - and may even prohibit such material - in an effort to discourage imitators.

articles.title: Taiwan's New Party vows to help improve relations
articles.description: Top political adviser Yu Zhengsheng met with a Taiwan delegation representing the island's New Party in Beijing on Monday to discuss the peaceful development of cross-Straits relations and how to achieve the "great rejuvenation" of the Chinese nation.

articles.title: Former Chongqing political official facing corruption investigation
articles.description: Sun Zhengcai, the former secretary of Chongqing Municipal Committee of the Communist Party of China, has been placed under investigation on suspicion of accepting bribes, according to the Supreme People's Procuratorate on Monday.

articles.title: Satellite lofted for first Arab country

articles.title: Oldest Nanjing Massacre survivor dies at 100
articles.description: The oldest survivor of the Nanjing Massacre died on Sunday, and fewer than 100 survivors remain, the Memorial Hall of the Victims in the Nanjing Massacre said on Monday.

articles.title: AIIB loans $250m for Beijing coal-to-gas conversion
articles.description: The Asian Infrastructure Investment Bank announced on Monday a $250 million loan for a natural gas project in Beijing, the bank's first such investment in China, to help cut coal use and improve air quality in the capital area.

articles.description: High in the northwestern uplands of Yunnan lies a popular destination known as Shangri-La since 2001. When Bruce Connolly visited it in 1995, it was called Zhongdian. A town partly fulfilling Bruce’s Tibetan dream.

articles.description: Urban management authorities in Beijing’s Haidian district have suspended the removal of signs and billboards from buildings, and have not made a decision when work would resume.

articles.description: The People’s Liberation Army has sent 10 of its female members to join the garrison guarding the Nansha Islands in the South China Sea, according to the PLA Navy.

articles.description: A forum tackling the more challenging problems in urban development gathered people in this area on Saturday to raise awareness of greener and more sustainable urban development.

articles.description: Police in eastern China said on Monday they have smashed an operation that made more than 20 million yuan ($3 million) from selling fake Herbalife products.

articles.description: The Jack Ma Foundation has pledged to spend at least 300 million yuan ($45 million) in the next decade to staff rural schools with qualified teachers.

articles.description: The director of the State Council's Taiwan Affairs Office met with a delegation from Taiwan's New Party on Monday to promote peaceful development of cross-Straits relations.

articles.description: An NGO helped an epileptic boy from eastern China realize his dream to ride a race car on an international circuit on Monday.

articles.description: Six people were killed on Sunday afternoon in a fire at a bath house in Yongnian district of Handan, Hebei province, authorities said on Monday.

articles.description: Residents of southwest China's Tibet autonomous region have been mobilized for government-paid patrolling jobs to protect the ecosystem on the "roof of the world."

articles.description: Many commentators have deemed 2017 to be year one for the artificial intelligence smartphone as iPhone X and Honor V10 launched into the highly competitive but uniform cellphone market. So will an intelligent phone be the next great breakthrough?

articles.title: Xi stresses nonstop efforts to fight undesirable work styles

articles.title: China launches communication satellite for Algeria
articles.description: China launched Algeria's first communication satellite, Alcomsat-1, into a preset orbit from the Xichang Satellite Launch Center in the southwestern province of Sichuan early Monday.

articles.description: President Xi Jinping and his Algerian counterpart Abdelaziz Bouteflika exchanged congratulatory messages on the successful launch of Alcomsat-1 in the Xichang Satellite Launch Center in China's southwestern province of Sichuan early Monday.

articles.title: Autopsy: Jiang suffered several injuries before the fatal stab
articles.description: The trial of the alleged murderer of Chinese student Jiang Ge began at 10 am on Monday in Tokyo. It will last seven days and the verdict is expected on Dec 20.

articles.title: Asia's tallest wooden pagoda destroyed
articles.description: The 16-story structure was said to be the tallest wooden pagoda in Asia. No casualties were reported in the incident. The cause of the blaze is under investigation.

articles.title: Guizhou: Western province looks to the future of big data
articles.description: While located in the remote southwestern part of China, Guizhou leads the development of Big Data technology in recent years.

cctv.summary:
🔬 今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **中俄联合反导演习与军事技术民用化**：北京与莫斯科举行潜在导弹战争演练，同时中国推动更多军事技术向民用领域转化，以促进经济发展，体现国防与经济的深度融合。

2. **高层反腐与作风建设持续推进**：前重庆政治官员因腐败被调查，习近平总书记强调要“根除不良工作作风”，显示反腐败和作风建设仍是当前政治重点。

3. **生态治理与绿色转型成效显著**：国际组织赞扬中国绿色复兴；南水北调工程带动环境改善与就业；亚投行贷款2.5亿美元支持北京“煤改气”项目，凸显绿色发展成为重要政策方向。

4. **中国外交与区域关系新动向**：习近平式外交推动中国与世界更紧密联系；台湾新党承诺改善两岸关系；中国为阿拉伯国家发射首颗卫星，展现外交多元布局。

5. **民生与公共安全议题受关注**：教育、医疗费用成为社会焦点；视频平台抵制危险行为；南京大屠杀最年长幸存者去世，纪念日强调“铭记与激励”，反映社会对历史与安全的双重关切。

今日最值得关注的发展是：**中俄联合反导演习与军事技术大规模转向民用，标志着中国在安全与经济发展双轨道上同步加速，同时生态治理与反腐行动持续深化，构成当前国家治理的核心主线。**
